title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
